button.primary: bg-[#D97706] text-white hover:bg-[#F59E0B] rounded-none border border-[#D97706] px-8 py-3 transition-colors duration-300 font-body text-lg
button.outline: bg-transparent text-white border-2 border-white/60 hover:bg-white hover:text-black rounded-none px-8 py-3 transition-colors duration-300 font-body text-lg

card.base: bg-[#1A1A1A] border-2 border-white/10 hover:border-white/30 transition-all duration-300 p-6 md:p-8 rounded-sm group

input.base: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-white/20 focus:border-[#D97706] text-white py-3 px-2 w-full transition-colors font-body rounded-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-gray-500

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#111111]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10

visual_effects.chalkboard_texture: Add a pseudo-element over sections with a subtle radial gradient or noise background to mimic chalk smudges. Example: `background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 80%, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, transparent 50%)`
visual_effects.text_shadow: For hero chalk text: `text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.1);`
visual_effects.doodles: Use Lucide React icons with varying stroke widths (1 to 1.5) and slight rotations (`rotate-3`, `-rotate-6`) colored in white/80 to simulate hand-drawn accents.
visual_effects.hover_animations: Subtle translations on hover. Chalk 'erase' effect or slow fade-ins.

hero.alt: Rustic clay pots on wooden table
hero.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay (bg-black/60)

instructions_to_main_agent: Include 'Caveat' and 'Outfit' fonts from Google Fonts in index.html.
Build the website using pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts, use minimal Shadcn if necessary but override styles heavily to avoid the SaaS look.
Incorporate a persistent Header and Footer.
Use Lucide icons to mimic hand-drawn doodles (e.g., Coffee, ArrowRight, Star) and apply subtle tilt (rotate classes) to make them look organic.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Create the Order Now system as a functional cart that can save to DB and send a WhatsApp message.
Implement the Contact form and About Us section with the chalkboard theme.
